# Tech Force LLC

> Tech Force LLC is a Kansas-based technology services and products company founded by Jacob Stewart. We deliver senior-level engineering talent and strategic technical leadership to startups and SMBs at a fraction of the cost of a full-time hire.

Tech Force LLC was founded in 2023 by Jacob Stewart, a senior software engineer with 10+ years of hands-on experience. Jacob is a founding engineer at Sunnybrook, a bootstrapped TMS startup that grew from zero to 50+ enterprise customers in under two years. He has operated across engineering, product, DevOps, hiring, client success, and organizational leadership.

The company operates two business lines: (1) consulting services for startups and SMBs, and (2) proprietary software and hardware products targeting underserved niche markets.

## Services

- [Fractional CTO](/services/): Embedded strategic technical leadership on a part-time basis. Covers architecture decisions, engineering hiring, vendor evaluation, roadmap planning, and board-level technical communication. Priced at $3,000–$8,000/month. Highest-priority service line.
- [Application Development](/services/): Custom production-grade software for web, mobile, and embedded systems. Fixed-scope projects or hourly retainers. Senior-only execution — no junior-developer risk or agency overhead.
- [AI Agent Orchestration & Strategy](/services/): Design and implementation of AI-powered workflows, agents, and automation pipelines. Covers LLM selection, prompt engineering, agent tooling, and production deployment.
- [Vibe Code Rescue](/services/): Targeted intervention for failing, stalled, or inherited codebases. Diagnostic retainer plus optional remediation project. Called in when other developers have left a mess.
- [Architecture Consulting](/services/): System design, platform evaluation, and architecture reviews. Delivered as written documentation, design reviews, or advisory sessions.
- [OpenClaw Setup & Strategy](/services/): Expert implementation and configuration for organizations adopting OpenClaw.

## Products

- [Student Information System (SIS)](/products/): A Moodle-integrated SIS with transcript generation, academic records management, and reporting. Built for small private schools, Bible colleges, and independent educational institutions that use Moodle as their LMS. Priced from $99/month. Currently live at Living Faith Bible Institute (LFBI).
- [Sound Security](/products/): A Zigbee-based smart home security hub compatible with thousands of off-the-shelf Zigbee devices and RTSP cameras. No forced cloud subscription or monthly monitoring fees. Full user self-setup. Currently in active development.

## Company

- [About](/about/): Background on Jacob Stewart, the founder's experience at Sunnybrook, and the company's mission and approach.
- [Contact](/contact/): Contact form for service inquiries, product interest, or general questions. Responds within one business day.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2023
- Location: Kansas, USA
- Legal structure: LLC
- Current clients: Living Faith Bible Institute (LFBI), Sunnybrook (employment relationship with Fractional CTO proposal under consideration)
- Technology stack experience: Python, Node.js, PHP/Laravel, Flutter, React, Vue, C/C++, ESP-IDF (embedded), Moodle, Zigbee
